title: rubus vestitus var. leucanthemus
intro: Rubus vestitus var. leucanthemus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or White-flowered Raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known variant of the raspberry plant species. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus vestitus var. leucanthemus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
